caption: "January 23rd is the last day to add or make changes to 16-week courses, drop a 16-week course without a W on your record, or drop all eligible courses to receive 100% cancellation of tuition and fees. Make sure your schedule is finalized before the deadline! For any questions on adding or dropping courses, make sure to check with your Academic Advisor and contact the Office of the Registrar at registration@uic.edu for any assistance. Please keep in mind that any changes to your schedule during the add/drop period can impact your financial aid, including grant, loan, and scholarship eligibility.".
caption_raw: 4 likes, 0 comments - uicstudentaid January 20, 2026: "January 23rd is the last day to add or make changes to 16-week courses, drop a 16-week course without a W on your record, or drop all eligible courses to receive 100% cancellation of tuition and fees. Make sure your schedule is finalized before the deadline! For any questions on adding or dropping courses, make sure to check with your Academic Advisor and contact the Office of the Registrar at registration@uic.edu for any assistance. Please keep in mind that any changes to your schedule during the add/drop period can impact your financial aid, including grant, loan, and scholarship eligibility.".

caption:
"Spring semester grades have posted. We will send notifications tomorrow to any students whose financial aid eligibility will be cancelled for not meeting Satisfactory Academic Progress (SAP) requirements. 

Tips for Meeting SAP Requirements: 
1. Maintain a 2.0 GPA
2. Complete 67%+ of attempted courses
3. Complete undergraduate degree within 180 credit hours. 

#financialaid #UIC #ThisIsUIC #UICLife".
